items.title: Respond to Barak (Opti) with next steps on round terms
items.context: Email from Richie on Jun 16: 'We indicated to Barak that we would bring the terms back to the group and follow up with next steps.' Round is ~$16M at ~$75-80M pre-money, Mayfield and YL Ventures co-leading.

items.title: Discuss Opti allocation internally — rightsize from proposed $4M to ~$2M
items.context: Email from Richie on Jun 16: 'Recommendation: I recommend leaning in here pending continued DD + our getting comfortable with our check size (i.e. rightsizing closer to ~$2M).'

items.title: Follow up with Matt Polak on VanishID term sheet update in ~1 week
items.context: Email from matt@vanishid.com on Jun 18: 'We have been going back and forth on some term sheets. I hope to have an update in the next week or so.'

items.context: Calendar event 'SMBC AD management meeting about SMBC Fin Atlas Beyond Fund' on Jun 24 at 3:00 PM ET with SMBC, Atlas Beyond, and Fin Capital leadership — recurring LP governance meeting.
